author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Two tasks: 1) Update workspace README with new features (einops, LoRA, fixed-point, K-FAC, unified device tensor, FlashAttention GPU, PagedAttention, GGUF, updated test count). 2) Ensure all crates have READMEs and correct Cargo.toml fields — check for any new crates missing them (ferrotorch-hub was added in Phase 10 Wave 3).
